articles.title: Multi-Agent Video Recommenders: Evolution, Patterns, and Open Challenges
articles.description: Video recommender systems are among the most popular and impactful applications of AI, shaping content consumption and influencing culture for billions of users. Traditional single-model recommenders, which optimize static engagement metrics, are increasingly limited in addressing the dynamic req...

articles.title: MTI: A Behavior-Based Temperament Profiling System for AI Agents
articles.description: AI models of equivalent capability can exhibit fundamentally different behavioral patterns, yet no standardized instrument exists to measure these dispositional differences.
